tables.name: calendars_users_labels
tables.def:
CREATE TABLE `calendars_users_labels` (
  `calendar_id` bigint(20) NOT NULL,
  `user_label_id` bigint(20) NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`calendar_id`,`user_label_id`),
  KEY `fk_calendars_users_labels_user_label_id` (`user_label_id`),
  CONSTRAINT `fk_calendars_users_labels_calendar_id` FOREIGN KEY (`calendar_id`) REFERENCES `calendars` (`calendar_id`) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_calendars_users_labels_user_label_id` FOREIGN KEY (`user_label_id`) REFERENCES `users_labels` (`user_label_id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci

tables.name: member_moderations_history
tables.def:
CREATE TABLE `member_moderations_history` (
  `member_moderation_event_id` bigint(20) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `organization_id` bigint(20) NOT NULL,
  `member_user_id` bigint(20) NOT NULL,
  `admin_user_id` bigint(20) DEFAULT NULL,
  `created_at` datetime(6) NOT NULL,
  `reason` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `expires_at` datetime(6) DEFAULT NULL,
  `action` enum('ban','unban') NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`member_moderation_event_id`),
  KEY `fk_member_moderations_history_admin_user_id` (`admin_user_id`),
  KEY `fk_member_moderations_history_member_user_id` (`member_user_id`),
  KEY `fk_member_moderations_history_organization_id` (`organization_id`),
  CONSTRAINT `fk_member_moderations_history_admin_user_id` FOREIGN KEY (`admin_user_id`) REFERENCES `users` (`user_id`) ON DELETE SET NULL,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_member_moderations_history_member_user_id` FOREIGN KEY (`member_user_id`) REFERENCES `users` (`user_id`) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_member_moderations_history_organization_id` FOREIGN KEY (`organization_id`) REFERENCES `organizations` (`organization_id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci

tables.name: organization_members_history
tables.def:
CREATE TABLE `organization_members_history` (
  `organization_member_event_id` bigint(20) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `organization_id` bigint(20) NOT NULL,
  `member_user_id` bigint(20) NOT NULL,
  `added` tinyint(1) NOT NULL,
  `created_at` datetime(6) NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`organization_member_event_id`),
  KEY `fk_organization_members_history_member_user_id` (`member_user_id`),
  KEY `fk_organization_members_history_organization_id` (`organization_id`),
  CONSTRAINT `fk_organization_members_history_member_user_id` FOREIGN KEY (`member_user_id`) REFERENCES `users` (`user_id`) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_organization_members_history_organization_id` FOREIGN KEY (`organization_id`) REFERENCES `organizations` (`organization_id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci

tables.name: users
tables.def:
CREATE TABLE `users` (
  `user_id` bigint(20) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `email` varchar(320) NOT NULL,
  `first_name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `last_name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `password_hash` varbinary(255) NOT NULL,
  `middle_name` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`user_id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `uq_users_email` (`email`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=[Redacted by tbls] DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci

tables.name: join_responses_history
tables.def:
CREATE TABLE `join_responses_history` (
  `join_response_event_id` bigint(20) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `join_prompt_event_id` bigint(20) NOT NULL,
  `user_id` bigint(20) NOT NULL,
  `response` text NOT NULL,
  `created_at` datetime(6) NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`join_response_event_id`),
  KEY `fk_join_responses_history_join_prompt_event_id` (`join_prompt_event_id`),
  KEY `fk_join_responses_history_user_id` (`user_id`),
  CONSTRAINT `fk_join_responses_history_join_prompt_event_id` FOREIGN KEY (`join_prompt_event_id`) REFERENCES `join_prompts_history` (`join_prompt_event_id`) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_join_responses_history_user_id` FOREIGN KEY (`user_id`) REFERENCES `users` (`user_id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci

tables.name: calendars
tables.def:
CREATE TABLE `calendars` (
  `calendar_id` bigint(20) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `owner_user_id` bigint(20) NOT NULL,
  `name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `description` text DEFAULT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`calendar_id`),
  KEY `fk_calendars_owner_user_id` (`owner_user_id`),
  CONSTRAINT `fk_calendars_owner_user_id` FOREIGN KEY (`owner_user_id`) REFERENCES `users` (`user_id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=[Redacted by tbls] DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci

tables.name: join_prompts_history
tables.def:
CREATE TABLE `join_prompts_history` (
  `join_prompt_event_id` bigint(20) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `organization_id` bigint(20) NOT NULL,
  `owner_user_id` bigint(20) DEFAULT NULL,
  `prompt` text NOT NULL,
  `created_at` datetime(6) NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`join_prompt_event_id`),
  KEY `fk_join_prompts_history_organization_id` (`organization_id`),
  KEY `fk_join_prompts_history_owner_user_id` (`owner_user_id`),
  CONSTRAINT `fk_join_prompts_history_organization_id` FOREIGN KEY (`organization_id`) REFERENCES `organizations` (`organization_id`) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_join_prompts_history_owner_user_id` FOREIGN KEY (`owner_user_id`) REFERENCES `users` (`user_id`) ON DELETE SET NULL
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci

tables.name: join_requests_history
tables.def:
CREATE TABLE `join_requests_history` (
  `join_request_event_id` bigint(20) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `join_response_event_id` bigint(20) NOT NULL,
  `admin_user_id` bigint(20) DEFAULT NULL,
  `created_at` datetime(6) NOT NULL,
  `status` enum('open','accepted','denied') NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`join_request_event_id`),
  KEY `fk_join_requests_history_admin_user_id` (`admin_user_id`),
  KEY `fk_join_requests_history_join_response_event_id` (`join_response_event_id`),
  CONSTRAINT `fk_join_requests_history_admin_user_id` FOREIGN KEY (`admin_user_id`) REFERENCES `users` (`user_id`) ON DELETE SET NULL,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_join_requests_history_join_response_event_id` FOREIGN KEY (`join_response_event_id`) REFERENCES `join_responses_history` (`join_response_event_id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci

tables.name: users_labels
tables.def:
CREATE TABLE `users_labels` (
  `user_label_id` bigint(20) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `user_id` bigint(20) NOT NULL,
  `name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `color` char(6) NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`user_label_id`),
  KEY `fk_users_labels_user_id` (`user_id`),
  CONSTRAINT `fk_users_labels_user_id` FOREIGN KEY (`user_id`) REFERENCES `users` (`user_id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci

tables.name: organization_calendars_history
tables.def:
CREATE TABLE `organization_calendars_history` (
  `organization_calendar_event_id` bigint(20) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `organization_id` bigint(20) NOT NULL,
  `calendar_id` bigint(20) NOT NULL,
  `admin_user_id` bigint(20) DEFAULT NULL,
  `added` tinyint(1) NOT NULL,
  `created_at` datetime(6) NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`organization_calendar_event_id`),
  KEY `fk_organization_calendars_history_admin_user_id` (`admin_user_id`),
  KEY `fk_organization_calendars_history_calendar_id` (`calendar_id`),
  KEY `fk_organization_calendars_history_organization_id` (`organization_id`),
  CONSTRAINT `fk_organization_calendars_history_admin_user_id` FOREIGN KEY (`admin_user_id`) REFERENCES `users` (`user_id`) ON DELETE SET NULL,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_organization_calendars_history_calendar_id` FOREIGN KEY (`calendar_id`) REFERENCES `calendars` (`calendar_id`) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_organization_calendars_history_organization_id` FOREIGN KEY (`organization_id`) REFERENCES `organizations` (`organization_id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci

tables.name: users_sessions
tables.def:
CREATE TABLE `users_sessions` (
  `session_hash` binary(32) NOT NULL,
  `user_id` bigint(20) NOT NULL,
  `expires_at` datetime(6) NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`session_hash`),
  KEY `fk_users_sessions_user_id` (`user_id`),
  CONSTRAINT `fk_users_sessions_user_id` FOREIGN KEY (`user_id`) REFERENCES `users` (`user_id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci

tables.name: member_roles_history
tables.def:
CREATE TABLE `member_roles_history` (
  `member_role_event_id` bigint(20) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `organization_id` bigint(20) NOT NULL,
  `member_user_id` bigint(20) NOT NULL,
  `owner_user_id` bigint(20) DEFAULT NULL,
  `created_at` datetime(6) NOT NULL,
  `role` enum('owner','admin','user') NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`member_role_event_id`),
  KEY `fk_member_roles_history_member_user_id` (`member_user_id`),
  KEY `fk_member_roles_history_organization_id` (`organization_id`),
  KEY `fk_member_roles_history_owner_user_id` (`owner_user_id`),
  CONSTRAINT `fk_member_roles_history_member_user_id` FOREIGN KEY (`member_user_id`) REFERENCES `users` (`user_id`) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_member_roles_history_organization_id` FOREIGN KEY (`organization_id`) REFERENCES `organizations` (`organization_id`) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_member_roles_history_owner_user_id` FOREIGN KEY (`owner_user_id`) REFERENCES `users` (`user_id`) ON DELETE SET NULL
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci

tables.name: calendar_writes_history
tables.def:
CREATE TABLE `calendar_writes_history` (
  `calendar_write_event_id` bigint(20) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `calendar_id` bigint(20) NOT NULL,
  `writer_user_id` bigint(20) DEFAULT NULL,
  `ical_encrypted` longblob NOT NULL,
  `created_at` datetime(6) NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`calendar_write_event_id`),
  KEY `fk_calendar_writes_history_calendar_id` (`calendar_id`),
  KEY `fk_calendar_writes_history_writer_user_id` (`writer_user_id`),
  CONSTRAINT `fk_calendar_writes_history_calendar_id` FOREIGN KEY (`calendar_id`) REFERENCES `calendars` (`calendar_id`) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_calendar_writes_history_writer_user_id` FOREIGN KEY (`writer_user_id`) REFERENCES `users` (`user_id`) ON DELETE SET NULL
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=[Redacted by tbls] DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci

tables.name: organizations
tables.def:
CREATE TABLE `organizations` (
  `organization_id` bigint(20) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `requires_join_request` tinyint(1) NOT NULL,
  `created_at` datetime(6) NOT NULL,
  `description` text DEFAULT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`organization_id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci

functions.name: create_calendar
functions.arguments: p_actor_user_id bigint; p_name varchar; p_ical longblob; p_description text; p_AES_SECRET_KEY binary; out_calendar_id bigint

functions.name: create_organization
functions.arguments: p_actor_user_id bigint; p_name varchar; p_requires_join_request tinyint; p_description text; out_organization_id bigint

functions.name: SSELECT
functions.arguments: p_table varchar; p_database varchar; p_where varchar
